text.content: Groomed 2026-05-14 Sprint 4 candidate. Decisions: (1) Placeholder templates now — brand assets (logo, colours, fonts) to be supplied by Ken/Angie later as a follow-up update. (2) Pilot scope: Ahsoka + Yoda + Atlas. Future: all agents producing client deliverables. office-docs skill already installed — covers all 4 formats (PDF/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX). Work: pip install on OC1, generate-doc.sh wrapper, 4 placeholder branded templates, test output per format. Route to Forge for build. Atlas to define template structure/schema for consulting proposals + EA deliverables. Size: M. | Sprint 4 committed. Routed to Forge for build. Atlas to define template schema as first step (can run in parallel). No brand assets needed to start — placeholders first.
